description: Case diameter: 28 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1yrFibre square case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite round dial with branding at the 12 hour mark and brand logo at the 7 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
